en: One time, Gu-gu's mom spoke with me about how

zh: 果果晚上仍和父母睡在一張床、
en: Gu-gu still slept in the same bed as his parents at night,

zh: 有什麼方法可以訓練他獨立些、
en: whether there was some way to train him to be more independent.

zh: 一位大班即將畢業的孩子、
en: A child about to graduate from the senior preschool class

zh: 的確不適合在和父母睡同一張床了、
en: really should not still be sleeping in the same bed as the parents.

zh: 我就將訓練自己孩子的方法告訴他們、
en: So I shared with them the methods I used with my own children,

zh: 希望對果果的父母有幫助。
en: hoping it would help Gu-gu's parents.
